attributes.name: title
attributes.description: Human-readable product title from page titles, product names, or equivalent source fields.
attributes.normalization: trim whitespace, collapse repeated spaces, preserve meaningful casing for display

attributes.name: brand
attributes.normalization: canonicalize common casing and aliases without inventing unsupported brands

attributes.name: model_number
attributes.description: Manufacturer model number or model identifier used for linkage and entity display.
attributes.normalization: remove decorative punctuation where safe, preserve alphanumeric identity

attributes.name: category
attributes.normalization: map source category labels to a compact canonical vocabulary

attributes.name: description
attributes.description: Short product description or feature summary.
attributes.normalization: trim and preserve source-supported descriptive text

attributes.name: price
attributes.description: Observed product price as a numeric amount when available.
attributes.normalization: parse numeric amount separately from currency and keep source claim provenance

attributes.name: currency
attributes.description: ISO-like currency code or symbol-derived currency for the associated price.
attributes.normalization: normalize symbols and names to currency codes where unambiguous

attributes.name: specifications
attributes.description: Semi-structured long-tail product specifications preserved as independently traceable claims.
attributes.normalization: store each key as a specification claim with raw value, parsed value, optional unit, and provenance
